name: Operations/ms-bulk-update
description: $bulk-update conformance tests ported from Microsoft.Health.Fhir.Shared.Tests.E2E.Rest.BulkUpdateTests. $bulk-update is an async long-running job invoked with HTTP PATCH (not POST/DELETE) and a Prefer: respond-async header, whose body is a standard FHIRPath-Patch Parameters resource (Ignixa.TestScript.Client.HttpTestRequestProvider serializes the fixture body as-is; the same 'operation'/'part'(type/path/name/value) shape already used by CRUD/patch-fhirpath.json applies here per the FHIRPath Patch spec). This engine has no wait-for-completion/polling-loop primitive, so job completion (ResourceUpdatedCount/ResourcePatchFailedCount/ResourceIgnoredCount Parameters) is NOT verified -- only kick-off acceptance (202 + Content-Location), a single best-effort status poll (warningOnly), and the fully synchronous validation-failure scenarios (400, no async involved) are asserted. All fixtures use meta.tag http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/test|<unique-tag-per-scenario> to stay isolated from other suites on a shared server.

variable.name: bulkUpdateLocation
variable.description: Job-status URL from the Content-Location header of the system-level kickoff response; falls back to GET $bulk-update if the header was absent.

test.name: $bulk-update: invalid search parameter is rejected with 400
test.description: PATCH /$bulk-update?_tag=...&invalidParam=badRequest with a valid FHIRPath-Patch body must still be rejected with 400 because invalidParam is not a valid search parameter, matching GivenBulkUpdateRequestWithInvalidSearchParameters_WhenRequested_ThenBadRequestIsReturned. This is fully synchronous validation; no job is created.

test.name: $bulk-update: unsupported patch type combination is rejected with 400
test.description: PATCH /$bulk-update?_tag=... with an 'add' on Patient.gender (a single-cardinality element, not a list -- add is only valid on repeating elements) combined with an 'insert' on a nonexistent list path must be rejected with 400, matching GivenBulkUpdateRequestWithUnsupportedPatchType_WhenRequested_ThenBadRequestIsReturned.

test.name: $bulk-update: unsupported resource types (SearchParameter, StructureDefinition) are rejected with 400
test.description: PATCH /SearchParameter/$bulk-update and /StructureDefinition/$bulk-update, even with an empty Parameters body, must both be rejected with 400 because these resource types are excluded from bulk update, matching GivenBulkUpdateRequestWithUnsupportedResourceTypes_WhenRequested_ThenBadRequestIsReturned.

operation.description: PATCH SearchParameter/$bulk-update?_tag=... with an empty Parameters body
PATCH StructureDefinition/$bulk-update?_tag=... with an empty Parameters body

test.name: $bulk-update kick-off: system-level with a valid patch returns 202 Accepted
test.description: PATCH /$bulk-update?_tag=http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/test|fhir262-bu-sys with Prefer: respond-async and a valid replace-Patient.active patch must return 202 Accepted with a non-empty Content-Location job-status header, matching GivenVariousResourcesOfDifferentTypes_WhenBulkUpdatedAtSystemLevel_ThenAllAreUpdated (job completion itself is not verified; see suite description).

assert.description: Content-Location header must be present and non-empty

test.name: $bulk-update: single best-effort status poll
test.description: GET the Content-Location captured from the system-level kickoff. This is a single request, not a wait loop; the job may already be complete (200 + Parameters) or still running (202) by the time this runs, so the whole assertion is warningOnly.

operation.description: GET the bulk-update job status URL

assert.description: Status poll should return a 2xx status, either 202 (still running) or 200 (complete) (warningOnly: timing-dependent)

test.name: $bulk-update kick-off: type-scoped (Patient/$bulk-update) accepts both _isParallel=true and _isParallel=false
test.description: PATCH /Patient/$bulk-update?_tag=...&_isParallel=<true|false> with a valid patch must return 202 Accepted in both modes, matching GivenResourcesOfOneType_WhenBulkUpdatedByType_ThenAllOfThatTypeAreUpdated(resourceType, isParallel).
